GOJAPAN-FINAL-v12_4.html — 源碼

檔案名稱: GOJAPAN-FINAL-v12_4.html

字元數: 80,910

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

<!DOCTYPE html>

<html lang="zh-TW">

<head>

<meta charset="UTF-8">

<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">

<title>GOJAPAN v7 ✅</title>

<style>

@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Noto+Serif+TC:wght@400;600;700&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500&display=swap');

:root{--ink:#1a1410;--paper:#faf7f2;--warm:#f0ebe0;--accent:#c8502a;--al:#e8735a;--gold:#b8860b;--muted:#7a6e62;--border:#d4c8b8;--ok:#4a7c59}

*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}

body{background:var(--paper);color:var(--ink);font-family:'DM Sans','Noto Serif TC',sans-serif;min-height:100vh;overflow-x:hidden}

.hd{background:var(--ink);color:var(--paper);padding:22px 24px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;position:relative;overflow:hidden}

.hd::before{content:'';position:absolute;right:-30px;top:-30px;width:160px;height:160px;border:2px solid rgba(200,80,42,.25);border-radius:50%}

.hd-icon{font-size:26px}.hd-t{font-family:'Noto Serif TC',serif;font-size:18px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px}.hd-s{font-size:11px;color:rgba(250,247,242,.45);margin-top:2px}

.main{max-width:620px;margin:0 auto;padding:24px 16px 80px}

.steps{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:28px;align-items:center}

.dot{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--border);transition:all .3s}

.dot.active{background:var(--accent);width:24px;border-radius:4px}

.dot.done{background:var(--ok)}

.slbl{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);margin-left:8px;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase}

.fs{animation:fu .4s ease}

@keyframes fu{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(14px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}

.qb{margin-bottom:24px}

.ql{font-family:'Noto Serif TC',serif;font-size:15px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}

.qn{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:11px;color:var(--accent);background:rgba(200,80,42,.1);padding:2px 8px;border-radius:20px;font-weight:500}

.og{display:grid;gap:8px}.og.c2{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}.og.c3{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr}.og.c4{grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr)}

.ob{padding:11px 14px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;background:white;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;color:var(--ink);transition:all .2s;text-align:left}

.ob:hover{border-color:var(--al);background:rgba(200,80,42,.03)}

.ob.sel{border-color:var(--accent);background:rgba(200,80,42,.06);color:var(--accent);font-weight:500}

.ob .od{display:block;font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:2px;font-weight:400}

.ob.sel .od{color:var(--al)}

.cg{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px}

.cb{padding:10px 13px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;background:white;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;color:var(--ink);transition:all .2s;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}

.cb.chk{border-color:var(--accent);background:rgba(200,80,42,.06);color:var(--accent);font-weight:500}

.gbtn{width:100%;padding:15px;background:var(--accent);color:white;border:none;border-radius:10px;font-size:15px;font-family:'Noto Serif TC',serif;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;letter-spacing:2px;margin-top:6px;transition:all .2s}

.gbtn:hover{background:#b8441f;transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(200,80,42,.3)}

.gbtn:disabled{background:var(--border);color:var(--muted);transform:none;box-shadow:none;cursor:not-allowed}

.ld{display:none;text-align:center;padding:60px 20px}

.ld.show{display:block}

.sp{width:38px;height:38px;border:3px solid var(--border);border-top-color:var(--accent);border-radius:50%;animation:spin .8s linear infinite;margin:0 auto 18px}

@keyframes spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}

.rs{display:none;animation:fu .5s ease}

.rs.show{display:block}

.rh{background:var(--ink);color:var(--paper);border-radius:12px;padding:22px;margin-bottom:18px;position:relative;overflow:hidden}

.rh::after{content:'🇯🇵';position:absolute;right:18px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);font-size:44px;opacity:.18}

.rt{font-family:'Noto Serif TC',serif;font-size:19px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:4px}

.rm{font-size:12px;color:rgba(250,247,242,.45);letter-spacing:1px}

.notice{background:rgba(200,80,42,.07);border-left:3px solid var(--accent);padding:10px 14px;font-size:12px;color:var(--accent);border-radius:0 8px 8px 0;margin-bottom:18px}

.ub{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1a1410,#2d2218);border:1px solid var(--gold);border-radius:12px;padding:18px;margin-bottom:18px;display:none}

.ub.show{display:block;animation:fu .4s ease .3s both}

.ut{color:var(--gold);font-size:13px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:10px}

.ui{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:8px;margin-bottom:7px;color:rgba(250,247,242,.8);font-size:13px}

.ud{color:var(--accent);flex-shrink:0}

.ubtn{width:100%;padding:12px;background:var(--gold);color:var(--ink);border:none;border-radius:8px;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;font-family:'Noto Serif TC',serif;letter-spacing:1px;transition:all .2s;margin-top:12px}

.dc{background:white;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;margin-bottom:10px;overflow:hidden;transition:box-shadow .2s}

.dc:hover{box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(0,0,0,.07)}

.dh{background:var(--warm);padding:13px 18px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}

.dl{font-family:'Noto Serif TC',serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:700}

.db{font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);background:white;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:20px;border:1px solid var(--border)}

.dbody{padding:15px 18px}

.sl{margin-bottom:13px}.sl:last-child{margin-bottom:0}

.st{font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1.5px;margin-bottom:5px;font-weight:500}

.sc{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px}

.sm{flex:1}

.sn{font-size:14px;font-weight:500;margin-bottom:2px}

.sa{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted)}

.tip{font-size:11px;color:var(--accent);margin-top:3px}

.swp{flex-shrink:0;padding:5px 11px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:20px;background:white;font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);cursor:pointer;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;transition:all .2s;white-space:nowrap}

.swp:hover{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--accent)}

.swp.swapped{color:var(--ok);border-color:var(--ok);animation:pop .3s ease}

@keyframes pop{0%{transform:scale(1)}50%{transform:scale(1.1)}100%{transform:scale(1)}}

.dv{height:1px;background:var(--warm);margin:11px 0}

.fs2{background:var(--warm);border-radius:8px;padding:11px 13px;margin-top:10px}

.fl{font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:7px;font-weight:600}

.fm{font-size:13px;font-weight:500;margin-bottom:4px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:6px}

.fbk{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted)}

.ftg{font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);background:white;padding:2px 7px;border-radius:10px;border:1px solid var(--border)}

.tn{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:7px 11px;background:rgba(200,80,42,.06);border-radius:6px;margin-top:9px;font-size:11px;color:var(--accent)}

/* 移動日 banner */

.move-day{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1a1410,#2d2218);border-radius:8px;padding:13px 15px;margin-bottom:11px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px}

.move-day-icon{font-size:20px;flex-shrink:0}

.move-day-info{flex:1}

.move-day-route{color:var(--paper);font-size:13px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:2px}

.move-day-tip{font-size:11px;color:rgba(250,247,242,.5)}

.move-day-badge{font-size:10px;background:rgba(200,80,42,.7);color:white;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:10px;flex-shrink:0}

.move-day-lock{font-size:11px;color:rgba(200,80,42,.8);margin-top:7px;padding:6px 10px;background:rgba(200,80,42,.08);border-radius:6px}

.ss{margin-top:22px;padding:18px;background:white;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px}

.sstl{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:11px;font-weight:600}

.sg{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px}

.sbtn{padding:10px 12px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;background:white;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;color:var(--ink);transition:all .2s;text-align:left;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}

.sbtn:hover{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--accent);background:rgba(200,80,42,.04)}

.inqs{margin-top:22px;border:1.5px solid var(--accent);border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden}

.inqh{background:var(--accent);color:white;padding:16px 18px}

.inqt{font-family:'Noto Serif TC',serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:3px}

.inqs2{font-size:12px;opacity:.85}

.inqb{padding:18px;background:white}

.inqn{background:rgba(200,80,42,.07);border-left:3px solid var(--accent);padding:9px 13px;font-size:12px;color:var(--accent);border-radius:0 6px 6px 0;margin-bottom:18px}

.ig{margin-bottom:13px}

.il{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:5px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px}

.ia{font-size:10px;background:var(--ok);color:white;padding:1px 6px;border-radius:10px;font-weight:400}

.ii{width:100%;padding:9px 11px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:7px;font-size:13px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;color:var(--ink);background:white;outline:none;transition:border-color .2s}

.ii:focus{border-color:var(--accent)}

.iro .ii{background:var(--warm);color:var(--muted)}

.it{width:100%;padding:9px 11px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:7px;font-size:12px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;color:var(--ink);background:white;outline:none;resize:vertical;line-height:1.6;transition:border-color .2s}

.it:focus{border-color:var(--accent)}

.iro .it{background:var(--warm);color:var(--muted)}

.isn{background:var(--warm);border-radius:8px;padding:13px;margin-bottom:15px}

.isnt{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:7px}

.isnb{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);line-height:2;margin-bottom:9px}

.isnc{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:5px}

.ir{font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}

.ir input{accent-color:var(--accent)}

.cpbtn{width:100%;padding:14px;background:var(--ink);color:white;border:none;border-radius:9px;font-size:14px;font-family:'Noto Serif TC',serif;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;letter-spacing:1px;transition:all .2s;margin-bottom:7px}

.cpbtn:hover{background:var(--accent);transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.15)}

.cpbtn.copied{background:var(--ok)}

.cphi{text-align:center;font-size:11px;color:var(--muted)}

.rbtn{width:100%;padding:11px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:white;border-radius:8px;font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);cursor:pointer;margin-top:11px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;transition:all .2s}

.rbtn:hover{border-color:var(--ink);color:var(--ink)}

.toast{position:fixed;bottom:22px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(80px);background:var(--ink);color:var(--paper);padding:9px 18px;border-radius:20px;font-size:13px;transition:transform .3s;z-index:100;white-space:nowrap;max-width:90vw;text-align:center}

.toast.show{transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(0)}

/* Q6 住宿切換 */

.new-tag{display:inline-block;font-size:10px;background:var(--ok);color:white;padding:1px 7px;border-radius:10px;margin-left:6px;font-weight:500;vertical-align:middle}

</style>

</head>

<body>

<div class="hd">

<div class="hd-icon">🗾</div>

<div><div class="hd-t">日本行程規劃</div><div class="hd-s">GOJAPAN · AI TRIP PLANNER · v7</div></div>

</div>

<div class="main">

<div class="steps">

<div class="dot active" id="d0"></div>

<div class="dot" id="d1"></div>

<div class="dot" id="d2"></div>

<span class="slbl" id="slbl">填寫偏好</span>

</div>

 

<!-- FORM -->

<div class="fs" id="form">

 

<div class="qb">

<div class="ql"><span class="qn">Q1</span>目的地</div>

<div class="og c2">

<button class="ob" data-g="city" data-v="osaka_kyoto" onclick="sel(this)">大阪・京都<span class="od">關西經典路線</span></button>

<button class="ob" data-g="city" data-v="tokyo" onclick="sel(this)">東京<span class="od">都市精華路線</span></button>

</div>

<div class="og c2" style="margin-top:8px">

<button class="ob" data-g="city" data-v="hokkaido" onclick="sel(this)">北海道<span class="od">自然風景路線</span></button>

<button class="ob" data-g="city" data-v="okinawa" onclick="sel(this)">沖繩<span class="od">海島悠閒路線</span></button>

</div>

</div>

 

<div class="qb">

<div class="ql"><span class="qn">Q2</span>天數</div>

<div class="og c4">

<button class="ob" data-g="days" data-v="3" onclick="sel(this)">3天</button>

<button class="ob" data-g="days" data-v="4" onclick="sel(this)">4天</button>

<button class="ob" data-g="days" data-v="5" onclick="sel(this)">5天</button>

<button class="ob" data-g="days" data-v="6" onclick="sel(this)">6天</button>

</div>

</div>

 

<div class="qb">

<div class="ql"><span class="qn">Q3</span>旅遊節奏</div>

<div class="og c3">

<button class="ob" data-g="pace" data-v="easy" onclick="sel(this)">輕鬆<span class="od">少走多休息</span></button>

<button class="ob" data-g="pace" data-v="balanced" onclick="sel(this)">平衡<span class="od">一般節奏</span></button>

<button class="ob" data-g="pace" data-v="active" onclick="sel(this)">積極<span class="od">多跑不浪費</span></button>

</div>

</div>

 

<div class="qb">

<div class="ql"><span class="qn">Q4</span>旅伴類型</div>

<div class="og c2">

<button class="ob" data-g="group" data-v="couple" onclick="sel(this)">情侶</button>

<button class="ob" data-g="group" data-v="friends" onclick="sel(this)">朋友</button>

<button class="ob" data-g="group" data-v="family" onclick="sel(this)">家庭（有長輩）</button>

<button class="ob" data-g="group" data-v="kids" onclick="sel(this)">親子</button>

</div>

</div>

 

<div class="qb">

<div class="ql"><span class="qn">Q5</span>需求（可複選）</div>

<div class="cg">

<button class="cb" data-tag="shopping" onclick="tog(this)"><span>🛍️</span>購物</button>

<button class="cb" data-tag="food" onclick="tog(this)"><span>🍜</span>美食</button>

<button class="cb" data-tag="photo" onclick="tog(this)"><span>📸</span>拍照景點</button>

<button class="cb" data-tag="nature" onclick="tog(this)"><span>🌿</span>自然/郊區</button>

</div>

</div>

 

<div class="qb">

<div class="ql"><span class="qn">Q6</span>想加入跨城市行程？<span style="font-size:11px;font-weight:400;color:var(--muted);margin-left:6px">不選預設單城市</span></div>

<div class="og c2">

<button class="ob" id="hotel-yes" onclick="selHotel('yes')">是・加入延伸城市<span class="new-tag">NEW</span><span class="od">多城市・含行李與移動安排</span></button>

</div>

<div id="hotel-multi-note" style="display:none;margin-top:10px;background:rgba(74,124,89,.07);border:1.5px solid var(--ok);border-radius:10px;padding:13px 16px;font-size:12px;color:#2d6040;animation:fu .3s ease">

<strong style="display:block;margin-bottom:4px;font-size:13px">🗺️ 多城市模式已啟用</strong>

目的地選擇將被忽略，改用「東京→箱根→熱海」固定路線。移動日景點鎖定，換一個功能只在當日城市內替換。

</div>

</div>

 

<button class="gbtn" id="gbtn" onclick="gen()" disabled>產生我的行程 →</button>

</div>

 

<!-- LOADING -->

<div class="ld" id="ld"><div class="sp"></div><div style="color:var(--muted);font-size:14px">正在規劃最適合你的行程…</div></div>

 

<!-- RESULT -->

<div class="rs" id="rs">

<div class="rh"><div class="rt" id="rt">大阪・京都 5天4夜</div><div class="rm" id="rm">平衡節奏・朋友出遊</div></div>

<div class="notice">💡 每個景點都可以按「換一個」替換。行程不用完美，喜歡就好。</div>

<div class="ub" id="ub">

<div class="ut">✦ 升級優化版可以做到</div>

<div class="ui"><span class="ud">→</span><span>依人潮高峰自動調整景點時段</span></div>

<div class="ui"><span class="ud">→</span><span>替換排隊風險高的餐廳</span></div>

<div class="ui"><span class="ud">→</span><span>動線壓縮，減少無效移動</span></div>

<div class="ui"><span class="ud">→</span><span>每天加入天氣備案</span></div>

<button class="ubtn" onclick="toast2('升級功能開發中，敬請期待！')">升級優化版 NT$299 →</button>

</div>

<div id="cards"></div>

<div class="ss">

<div class="sstl">⚡ 旅途中突發狀況</div>

<div class="sg">

<button class="sbtn" onclick="sit('queue')"><span>⏱️</span>餐廳排太久</button>

<button class="sbtn" onclick="sit('rain')"><span>🌧️</span>下雨了</button>

<button class="sbtn" onclick="sit('late')"><span>🏃</span>行程來不及</button>

<button class="sbtn" onclick="sit('tired')"><span>😴</span>太累走不動</button>

</div>

</div>

<div class="inqs">

<div class="inqh"><div class="inqt">產生包車詢價單</div><div class="inqs2">填完後一鍵複製貼到 LINE 即可</div></div>

<div class="inqb">

<div class="inqn">✦ 天數、城市、行程由工具自動帶入，請補填其餘欄位</div>

<div class="ig"><div class="il">1. 台灣居住縣市</div><input class="ii" id="i1" placeholder="例：台北市、台中市..."></div>

<div class="ig"><div class="il">2. 出發地點（飯店或機場）</div><input class="ii" id="i2" placeholder="例：難波某飯店 / 關西機場"></div>

<div class="ig"><div class="il">3. 旅遊結束地點</div><input class="ii" id="i3" placeholder="例：大阪飯店 / 關西機場"></div>

<div class="ig"><div class="il">4. 預定包車日期</div><input class="ii" id="i4" placeholder="例：2026/08/10 ～ 2026/08/14"></div>

<div class="ig"><div class="il">5. 包車旅遊人數</div><input class="ii" id="i5" placeholder="例：大人4人、兒童1人"></div>

<div class="ig iro"><div class="il">6. 包車旅遊天數 <span class="ia">自動帶入</span></div><input class="ii" id="i6" readonly></div>

<div class="ig iro"><div class="il">7. 旅遊城市 <span class="ia">自動帶入</span></div><input class="ii" id="i7" readonly></div>

<div class="ig iro"><div class="il">8. 具體行程 <span class="ia">自動帶入</span></div><textarea class="it" id="i8" readonly rows="6"></textarea></div>

<div class="ig"><div class="il">9. 每日住宿地點</div><textarea class="it" id="i9" placeholder="例：Day1住難波、Day2住京都..." rows="3"></textarea></div>

<div class="ig"><div class="il">10. 兒童座椅需求</div><input class="ii" id="i10" placeholder="例：不需要 / 需要1個（3歲）"></div>

<div class="ig"><div class="il">11. 行李大小/件數</div><input class="ii" id="i11" placeholder="例：26吋/3件、28吋/2件"></div>

<div class="ig"><div class="il">12. 航班抵達時間</div><input class="ii" id="i12" placeholder="例：CI107 08/10 10:30抵關西"></div>

<div class="ig"><div class="il">13. 航班離境時間</div><input class="ii" id="i13" placeholder="例：CI108 08/14 15:00離關西"></div>

<div class="isn">

<div class="isnt">📋 諮詢服務說明</div>

<div class="isnb">✅ 已規劃好行程，只需報價 → <strong>免諮詢費</strong><br>📝 需協助規劃行程 → <strong>NT$2,000（成團可折抵）</strong></div>

<div class="isnc">

<label class="ir"><input type="radio" name="sv" value="quote" checked> 我已規劃好，只需報價</label>

<label class="ir"><input type="radio" name="sv" value="plan"> 需要協助規劃行程</label>

</div>

</div>

<button class="cpbtn" id="cpbtn" onclick="copy()">📋 一鍵複製詢價單 → 貼到 LINE</button>

<div class="cphi">複製後貼到 GOJAPAN LINE 客服即可</div>

</div>

</div>

<button class="rbtn" onclick="reset()">← 重新規劃</button>

</div>

</div>

<div class="toast" id="toast"></div>

 

<script>

// ── 單城市資料 ──────────────────────────────────────────

const SINGLE={

  osaka_kyoto:{

    spots:{

      "難波":[

        {name:"道頓堀・グリコ看板",tip:"晚上霓虹最美，包車停戎橋附近",km:0,driveMin:0,stayMin:40},

        {name:"心齋橋商圈",tip:"藥妝掃貨首選，從道頓堀走路5分",km:1,driveMin:5,stayMin:90},

        {name:"黑門市場",tip:"早上9點前最新鮮，攤販全開",km:1,driveMin:5,stayMin:60},

        {name:"法善寺橫丁",tip:"深夜食堂氛圍，傍晚後最有感",km:0,driveMin:3,stayMin:30}

      ],

      "大阪城":[

        {name:"大阪城公園（外圍）",tip:"包車可停天守閣前廣場，外圍拍照免門票",km:5,driveMin:15,stayMin:60},

        {name:"大阪城天守閣",tip:"平日早上9點開門前到最少人",km:5,driveMin:15,stayMin:90},

        {name:"中之島公園",tip:"大阪城附近10分鐘，適合飯後散步",km:6,driveMin:18,stayMin:45}

      ],

      "京都東山":[

        {name:"清水寺",tip:"上午10點前到，包車停產寧坂停車場",km:75,driveMin:70,stayMin:90},

        {name:"二年坂・三年坂",tip:"清水寺走下來就到，包車在清水坂等",km:75,driveMin:70,stayMin:60},

        {name:"高台寺",tip:"人少，二三坂走過來5分鐘",km:74,driveMin:68,stayMin:60},

        {name:"八坂神社",tip:"免費，全天開放，包車停祇園停車場",km:73,driveMin:67,stayMin:30}

      ],

      "伏見":[

        {name:"伏見稻荷大社",tip:"⚠️ 早上7:30前到，千本鳥居空曠無人",km:70,driveMin:65,stayMin:90},

        {name:"月桂冠大倉紀念館",tip:"稻荷附近5分，日本酒試飲體驗",km:68,driveMin:63,stayMin:60}

      ],

      "嵐山":[

        {name:"嵐山竹林",tip:"早上7點前幾乎無人，包車停嵐山公園",km:90,driveMin:80,stayMin:40},

        {name:"渡月橋",tip:"竹林走下來10分鐘，秋天楓葉最美",km:89,driveMin:78,stayMin:30},

        {name:"天龍寺庭園",tip:"史蹟庭園，渡月橋旁，門票500円",km:89,driveMin:79,stayMin:60},

        {name:"嵯峨野古道",tip:"人力車拍照聖地，包車在渡月橋等",km:89,driveMin:79,stayMin:50}

      ],

      "梅田":[

        {name:"梅田空中庭園展望台",tip:"晚上夜景，包車停Herbis停車場",km:3,driveMin:10,stayMin:60},

        {name:"Grand Front大阪",tip:"購物吃飯，離飯店最近，收車前最後一站",km:3,driveMin:10,stayMin:90}

      ],

      "奈良":[

        {name:"奈良公園・鹿群",tip:"鹿仙貝公園入口買，包車停春日野道",km:95,driveMin:85,stayMin:60},

        {name:"東大寺大佛殿",tip:"世界最大木造建築，早上人少",km:96,driveMin:86,stayMin:90},

        {name:"春日大社",tip:"東大寺走10分，樹蔭涼爽",km:97,driveMin:87,stayMin:60},

        {name:"ならまち（奈良町）",tip:"老街咖啡廳，下午最悠閒，包車停元興寺旁",km:94,driveMin:84,stayMin:90}

      ]

    },

    restaurants:{

      "難波":[

        {name:"一蘭拉麵 道頓堀店",backup:"金龍拉麵（24h）",tag:"拉麵"},

        {name:"燒肉力丸 心齋橋店",backup:"壽司郎 難波",tag:"燒肉"},

        {name:"串カツだるま 難波",backup:"CoCo壱番屋",tag:"炸串"}

      ],

      "京都東山":[

        {name:"奧丹清水（湯豆腐）",backup:"京豆腐藤野",tag:"傳統料理"},

        {name:"祇園NITI",backup:"附近4.0↑隨機",tag:"創意日料"}

      ],

      "嵐山":[{name:"湯豆腐 竹のや",backup:"嵐山附近定食店",tag:"湯豆腐"}],

      "奈良":[

        {name:"奈良 山崎屋（柿葉壽司）",backup:"附近定食屋",tag:"鄉土料理"},

        {name:"ならまち咖啡廳",backup:"便利商店",tag:"輕食"}

      ]

    },

    days:{

      "5":[

        {label:"Day 1",theme:"到達・難波輕鬆走",badge:"今天只走一條街",morning:null,afternoon:{area:"難波",index:0},evening:{area:"難波",index:1},food:{area:"難波",index:0},note:"抵達日，check-in 後包車接送，輕鬆逛"},

        {label:"Day 2",theme:"大阪城・市場",badge:"大阪精華日",morning:{area:"大阪城",index:0},afternoon:{area:"難波",index:2},evening:{area:"梅田",index:0},food:{area:"難波",index:1},note:"包車全日，大阪城→黑門→梅田夜景"},

        {label:"Day 3",theme:"京都・東山線",badge:"⚠️ 稻荷一定早上去",morning:{area:"伏見",index:0},afternoon:{area:"京都東山",index:0},evening:{area:"京都東山",index:2},food:{area:"京都東山",index:0},note:"包車從難波出發，伏見→清水寺→高台寺"},

        {label:"Day 4",theme:"嵐山・竹林",badge:"包車全日制",morning:{area:"嵐山",index:0},afternoon:{area:"嵐山",index:2},evening:{area:"嵐山",index:3},food:{area:"嵐山",index:0},note:"嵐山景點集中，包車停渡月橋附近一整天"},

        {label:"Day 5",theme:"回程日",badge:"無條件清空",morning:null,afternoon:null,evening:null,food:null,note:"早上咖啡，包車送機場"}

      ],

      "6":[

        {label:"Day 1",theme:"到達・難波輕鬆走",badge:"今天只走一條街",morning:null,afternoon:{area:"難波",index:0},evening:{area:"難波",index:1},food:{area:"難波",index:0},note:"抵達日，包車接機後輕鬆逛"},

        {label:"Day 2",theme:"大阪城・黑門",badge:"大阪精華日",morning:{area:"大阪城",index:0},afternoon:{area:"難波",index:2},evening:{area:"梅田",index:0},food:{area:"難波",index:1},note:"包車全日"},

        {label:"Day 3",theme:"京都・東山線",badge:"⚠️ 稻荷一定早上去",morning:{area:"伏見",index:0},afternoon:{area:"京都東山",index:0},evening:{area:"京都東山",index:2},food:{area:"京都東山",index:0},note:"包車從難波出發70分"},

        {label:"Day 4",theme:"嵐山・古道",badge:"包車全日制",morning:{area:"嵐山",index:0},afternoon:{area:"嵐山",index:2},evening:{area:"嵐山",index:3},food:{area:"嵐山",index:0},note:"嵐山包車停渡月橋"},

        {label:"Day 5",theme:"奈良・鹿と大佛",badge:"包車日歸",morning:{area:"奈良",index:0},afternoon:{area:"奈良",index:1},evening:{area:"奈良",index:3},food:{area:"奈良",index:0},note:"難波→奈良包車約85分"},

        {label:"Day 6",theme:"回程日",badge:"無條件清空",morning:null,afternoon:null,evening:null,food:null,note:"早上咖啡，包車送機場"}

      ]

    }

  },

  tokyo:{

    spots:{

      "新宿":[

        {name:"新宿歌舞伎町・東寶大樓",tip:"哥吉拉在頂樓，晚上必拍，包車停東宝前",km:0,driveMin:0,stayMin:40},

        {name:"新宿御苑",tip:"白天散步最舒服，包車停新宿門停車場",km:1,driveMin:5,stayMin:90},

        {name:"Donki 新宿本店",tip:"掃貨必去，24小時，包車在附近等",km:1,driveMin:5,stayMin:90},

        {name:"思い出横丁（燒烤橫丁）",tip:"傍晚最熱鬧，新宿站西口步行2分",km:1,driveMin:5,stayMin:60}

      ],

      "淺草":[

        {name:"淺草寺・仲見世通",tip:"早上8點前到，包車停雷門前停車場",km:12,driveMin:35,stayMin:90},

        {name:"合羽橋道具街",tip:"廚具控天堂，淺草寺走10分",km:11,driveMin:32,stayMin:60},

        {name:"隅田川・吾妻橋",tip:"淺草寺走5分，東京晴空塔背景拍照",km:12,driveMin:35,stayMin:30}

      ],

      "銀座":[

        {name:"銀座六丁目・主街",tip:"頂級百貨，包車停銀座駐車場",km:8,driveMin:25,stayMin:90},

        {name:"東銀座・歌舞伎座",tip:"外觀拍照免費，銀座走5分",km:8,driveMin:25,stayMin:30},

        {name:"築地外市場",tip:"早上8點前最新鮮，銀座附近10分",km:9,driveMin:28,stayMin:60}

      ],

      "原宿":[

        {name:"竹下通・表參道",tip:"平日早上人最少，包車停表參道Hills停車場",km:10,driveMin:30,stayMin:90},

        {name:"明治神宮",tip:"免費入場，表參道走5分",km:10,driveMin:30,stayMin:60}

      ],

      "澀谷":[

        {name:"澀谷十字路口・スクランブル交差点",tip:"傍晚人潮最壯觀，包車停Bunkamura停車場",km:11,driveMin:32,stayMin:40},

        {name:"澀谷天空展望台",tip:"需預約，夜景必看，澀谷站直通",km:11,driveMin:32,stayMin:90},

        {name:"代官山蔦屋書店",tip:"澀谷旁10分，網美咖啡廳最愛",km:12,driveMin:35,stayMin:60}

      ]

    },

    restaurants:{

      "新宿":[

        {name:"一蘭拉麵 新宿店",backup:"松屋 新宿",tag:"拉麵"},

        {name:"鳥貴族 新宿店",backup:"吉野家",tag:"居酒屋"}

      ],

      "淺草":[{name:"駒形どぜう（泥鰍鍋）",backup:"天丼 金子半之助",tag:"老字號"}],

      "銀座":[{name:"銀座 久兵衛（壽司）",backup:"すし三崎丸",tag:"壽司"}],

      "澀谷":[{name:"澀谷ヒカリエ 餐廳層",backup:"任何4.0↑店",tag:"選擇多"}]

    },

    days:{

      "5":[

        {label:"Day 1",theme:"到達・新宿",badge:"今天只走一條街",morning:null,afternoon:{area:"新宿",index:0},evening:{area:"新宿",index:3},food:{area:"新宿",index:0},note:"抵達日，包車接機後新宿周邊"},

        {label:"Day 2",theme:"淺草・銀座",badge:"東京經典日",morning:{area:"淺草",index:0},afternoon:{area:"銀座",index:0},evening:{area:"銀座",index:2},food:{area:"淺草",index:0},note:"包車全日，淺草→銀座→築地"},

        {label:"Day 3",theme:"澀谷・原宿",badge:"潮流文化日",morning:{area:"原宿",index:0},afternoon:{area:"澀谷",index:0},evening:{area:"澀谷",index:1},food:{area:"澀谷",index:0},note:"原宿到澀谷包車5分，步行也可"},

        {label:"Day 4",theme:"新宿・代官山",badge:"購物修養日",morning:{area:"新宿",index:1},afternoon:{area:"澀谷",index:2},evening:{area:"新宿",index:2},food:{area:"銀座",index:0},note:"包車新宿→代官山→Donki掃貨"},

        {label:"Day 5",theme:"回程日",badge:"無條件清空",morning:null,afternoon:null,evening:null,food:null,note:"早上咖啡，包車送機場"}

      ],

      "6":[

        {label:"Day 1",theme:"到達・新宿",badge:"今天只走一條街",morning:null,afternoon:{area:"新宿",index:0},evening:{area:"新宿",index:3},food:{area:"新宿",index:0},note:"抵達日輕鬆"},

        {label:"Day 2",theme:"淺草・隅田川",badge:"東京經典日",morning:{area:"淺草",index:0},afternoon:{area:"淺草",index:2},evening:{area:"銀座",index:0},food:{area:"淺草",index:0},note:"包車全日，淺草→隅田川→銀座"},

        {label:"Day 4",theme:"銀座・築地",badge:"美食購物日",morning:{area:"銀座",index:2},afternoon:{area:"銀座",index:0},evening:{area:"新宿",index:2},food:{area:"銀座",index:0},note:"包車早上築地，下午銀座"},

  },

  hokkaido:{

    spots:{

      "札幌":[

        {name:"狸小路商店街",tip:"室內購物，雨天也OK，包車停二条市場旁",km:0,driveMin:0,stayMin:90},

        {name:"薄野・夜景",tip:"北海道夜生活中心，包車晚上接送",km:1,driveMin:5,stayMin:60},

        {name:"大通公園",tip:"季節活動多，隨時好拍，包車停大通公園旁",km:1,driveMin:5,stayMin:45},

        {name:"北海道廳舊本廳舍",tip:"免費入場，紅磚建築，大通公園旁走3分",km:1,driveMin:5,stayMin:30}

      ],

      "小樽":[

        {name:"小樽運河",tip:"黃昏最美，路燈亮起時，包車停小樽運河駐車場",km:40,driveMin:45,stayMin:60},

        {name:"堺町通・玻璃工藝街",tip:"北一硝子不能錯過，運河走5分",km:40,driveMin:45,stayMin:90},

        {name:"小樽壽司屋通",tip:"新鮮海膽・鮭魚卵，堺町通旁",km:39,driveMin:44,stayMin:60}

      ],

      "富良野":[

        {name:"富田農場（薰衣草）",tip:"7月最盛開，早上光線好，包車直達農場",km:160,driveMin:130,stayMin:90},

        {name:"富良野起司工房",tip:"現做起司免費試吃，農場旁5分",km:158,driveMin:128,stayMin:45},

        {name:"北西の丘展望公園",tip:"360度丘陵，包車停展望台前",km:155,driveMin:125,stayMin:40}

      ],

      "美瑛":[

        {name:"拼布之路・丘陵景觀",tip:"⚠️ 景點分散，包車才跑得完",km:175,driveMin:140,stayMin:90},

        {name:"青池（白金青い池）",tip:"神秘藍色水池，早上光線最好，包車30分",km:180,driveMin:145,stayMin:60},

        {name:"四季彩之丘",tip:"花田分區，包車停場旁",km:173,driveMin:138,stayMin:60},

        {name:"新榮之丘展望公園",tip:"夕陽聖地，免費停車，包車收工前最後一站",km:170,driveMin:135,stayMin:30}

      ]

    },

    restaurants:{

      "札幌":[

        {name:"札幌味噌拉麵 けやき",backup:"一幻蝦味噌拉麵",tag:"拉麵"},

        {name:"二条市場・海鮮丼",backup:"附近迴轉壽司",tag:"海鮮"}

      ],

      "小樽":[{name:"小樽政寿司",backup:"壽司 根室花まる",tag:"壽司"}],

      "富良野":[{name:"富田農場餐廳",backup:"附近咖啡廳",tag:"定食"}],

      "美瑛":[{name:"美瑛選果（農場直送）",backup:"美瑛附近咖啡廳",tag:"農場料理"}]

    },

    days:{

      "5":[

        {label:"Day 1",theme:"到達・札幌",badge:"今天只走一條街",morning:null,afternoon:{area:"札幌",index:0},evening:{area:"札幌",index:1},food:{area:"札幌",index:0},note:"抵達日，包車接機後狸小路逛"},

        {label:"Day 5",theme:"回程日",badge:"無條件清空",morning:null,afternoon:null,evening:null,food:null,note:"早上咖啡，包車送新千歲機場"}

      ],

      "6":[

        {label:"Day 1",theme:"到達・札幌",badge:"今天只走一條街",morning:null,afternoon:{area:"札幌",index:0},evening:{area:"札幌",index:1},food:{area:"札幌",index:0},note:"抵達日，包車接機"},

        {label:"Day 2",theme:"小樽・日歸",badge:"海港包車日",morning:{area:"小樽",index:0},afternoon:{area:"小樽",index:1},evening:{area:"小樽",index:2},food:{area:"小樽",index:0},note:"包車出發45分"},

        {label:"Day 3",theme:"富良野・薰衣草",badge:"花田主力日",morning:{area:"富良野",index:0},afternoon:{area:"富良野",index:1},evening:{area:"富良野",index:2},food:{area:"富良野",index:0},note:"包車從札幌出發130分"},

      "南部":[

      "北部":[{name:"水族館附設餐廳",backup:"附近食堂",tag:"海景"}]

    },

      ],

      "小樽":[

        {name:"小樽運河",tip:"黃昏最美，路燈亮起時必拍",km:40,driveMin:45,stayMin:60},

        {name:"堺町通・玻璃工藝街",tip:"北一硝子不能錯過",km:40,driveMin:45,stayMin:90}

      ],

      "富良野":[

        {name:"富田農場（薰衣草）",tip:"7月最盛開，早上光線好",km:160,driveMin:130,stayMin:90},

        {name:"富良野起司工房",tip:"現做起司免費試吃",km:158,driveMin:128,stayMin:45},

        {name:"北西の丘展望公園",tip:"360度丘陵景色，日落必拍",km:155,driveMin:125,stayMin:40}

      ],

      "美瑛":[

        {name:"拼布之路・丘陵景觀",tip:"⚠️ 景點分散，包車才跑得完",km:175,driveMin:140,stayMin:90},

        {name:"青池（白金青い池）",tip:"神秘藍色水池，早上光線最好",km:180,driveMin:145,stayMin:60},

        {name:"四季彩之丘",tip:"花田分區，適合拍照",km:173,driveMin:138,stayMin:60},

        {name:"新榮之丘展望公園",tip:"夕陽聖地，免費，包車最後一站",km:170,driveMin:135,stayMin:30}

      ]

    },

      "札幌":[

    label:'那霸 → 石垣島',

    spots:{

      "那霸":[

        {name:"川平灣",tip:"沖繩最美海灣，玻璃底船必搭",km:560,driveMin:0,stayMin:90},

        {name:"石垣島燈塔・禦神崎",tip:"珊瑚礁海岸，日落必拍",km:562,driveMin:0,stayMin:60},

        {name:"底地海灘",tip:"淺灘透明，浮潛首選",km:558,driveMin:0,stayMin:90},

        {name:"石垣やいま村",tip:"琉球古民家，體驗傳統文化",km:555,driveMin:0,stayMin:75}

      ],

      "竹富島":[

        {name:"竹富島・水牛車",tip:"珊瑚礁小島，水牛車必做",km:561,driveMin:0,stayMin:60},

        {name:"西桟橋",tip:"日落聖地，傍晚必去",km:561,driveMin:0,stayMin:30},

        {name:"星砂の浜",tip:"找星沙，早上人最少",km:561,driveMin:0,stayMin:45}

      ]

    },

    restaurants:{

      "那霸":[

        {name:"沖繩そば 二合半",backup:"A&W（沖繩限定）",tag:"沖繩麵"},

        {name:"ゆうなんぎぃ",backup:"附近定食屋",tag:"沖繩料理"}

      ],

      "竹富島":[{name:"竹富島 かにふ",backup:"島上便當",tag:"島料理"}]

    },

    days:{

      "5":[

        {label:"Day 1",theme:"到達・那霸",badge:"今天只走一條街",hotel:"那霸",moveDay:false,from:null,to:null,morning:null,afternoon:{area:"那霸",index:0},evening:{area:"那霸",index:1},food:{area:"那霸",index:0},note:"抵達日，包車接機後國際通"},

// ── 地區座標表（包車實際行車距離用 Haversine 估算）────────

const COORDS={

  "難波":    {lat:34.6686,lng:135.5023},

  "新宿":    {lat:35.6896,lng:139.6921},

  "淺草":    {lat:35.7148,lng:139.7967},

  "銀座":    {lat:35.6717,lng:139.7650},

  "原宿":    {lat:35.6702,lng:139.7026},

  "澀谷":    {lat:35.6580,lng:139.7016},

  "箱根":    {lat:35.2327,lng:139.1069},

  "熱海":    {lat:35.0966,lng:139.0730},

  "札幌":    {lat:43.0618,lng:141.3545},

  "小樽":    {lat:43.1907,lng:140.9940},

  "富良野":  {lat:43.3423,lng:142.3831},

  "美瑛":    {lat:43.5928,lng:142.4698},

  "那霸":    {lat:26.2124,lng:127.6809},

  "南部":    {lat:26.0962,lng:127.6880},

  "北部":    {lat:26.6324,lng:128.0470},

  "石垣島":  {lat:24.3336,lng:124.1543},

  "竹富島":  {lat:24.3222,lng:124.0922},

};

 

// 城市名稱 → 代表座標

const CITY_COORD={

  "大阪":COORDS["難波"],"京都":COORDS["京都東山"],"奈良":COORDS["奈良"],

  "東京":COORDS["新宿"],"箱根":COORDS["箱根"],"熱海":COORDS["熱海"],

  "鎌倉":   {lat:35.3197,lng:139.5502},

  "日光":   {lat:36.7580,lng:139.5994},

  "札幌":COORDS["札幌"],"富良野":COORDS["富良野"],"美瑛":COORDS["美瑛"],

  "小樽":COORDS["小樽"],

  "登別":   {lat:42.4681,lng:141.1058},

  "函館":   {lat:41.7686,lng:140.7290},

  "洞爺湖": {lat:42.5487,lng:140.7795},

  "那霸":COORDS["那霸"],"石垣島":COORDS["石垣島"],"竹富島":COORDS["竹富島"],

  "宮古島": {lat:24.8050,lng:125.2814},

  "本部":   {lat:26.6324,lng:127.8866},

};

 

// 每個主城市可選的延伸目的地 + 每個目的地的景點資料

const DEST_CITIES={

  osaka_kyoto:{

    destinations:[

      {city:"奈良",  driveH:1.4,  spots:[

        {name:"奈良公園・鹿群",    tip:"鹿仙貝入口買，傍晚鹿最活躍", km:95,driveMin:85,stayMin:60},

        {name:"東大寺大佛殿",      tip:"世界最大木造建築，早上9點開門",km:96,driveMin:86,stayMin:90},

        {name:"春日大社",          tip:"東大寺走10分，樹蔭涼爽",      km:97,driveMin:87,stayMin:60},

        {name:"ならまち（奈良町）",tip:"老街咖啡廳，下午最悠閒",      km:94,driveMin:84,stayMin:90},

        {name:"若草山",            tip:"山頂360度，傍晚金色最美",     km:98,driveMin:88,stayMin:45}

      ]},

      {city:"神戶",  driveH:0.75, spots:[

        {name:"北野異人館街",      tip:"西洋建築群，包車停異人館駐車場",km:32,driveMin:35,stayMin:90},

        {name:"南京町（神戶中華街）",tip:"餃子・肉包現做現吃",        km:30,driveMin:32,stayMin:60},

        {name:"神戶港・ハーバーランド",tip:"夜景一流，包車送到港口",  km:31,driveMin:33,stayMin:60},

        {name:"有馬温泉",          tip:"日本最古老溫泉，神戶包車35分",km:45,driveMin:40,stayMin:90}

      ]},

      {city:"京都嵐山", driveH:1.25, spots:[

        {name:"嵐山竹林",          tip:"早上7點前無人，包車停嵐山公園",km:90,driveMin:80,stayMin:40},

        {name:"渡月橋",            tip:"秋天楓葉最美，竹林走10分",    km:89,driveMin:78,stayMin:30},

        {name:"天龍寺庭園",        tip:"史蹟庭園，門票500円",        km:89,driveMin:79,stayMin:60},

        {name:"嵯峨野古道",        tip:"人力車拍照聖地",              km:89,driveMin:79,stayMin:50}

      ]},

      {city:"姬路",  driveH:1.2, spots:[

        {name:"姬路城",            tip:"日本最美天守閣・白鷺城，包車停東門",km:70,driveMin:65,stayMin:120},

        {name:"好古園（姬路城庭園）",tip:"姬路城旁，和式庭園",        km:70,driveMin:65,stayMin:60},

        {name:"書寫山圓教寺",      tip:"ラストサムライ拍攝地，纜車上山",km:75,driveMin:70,stayMin:90}

      ]}

    ]

  },

  tokyo:{

    destinations:[

      {city:"箱根",  driveH:1.5, spots:[

        {name:"箱根神社・平和の鳥居",tip:"湖中鳥居，早上水面倒影",  km:95,driveMin:90,stayMin:60},

        {name:"大涌谷・黑玉子",    tip:"⚠️ 確認開放，火山地形壯觀",km:100,driveMin:95,stayMin:75},

        {name:"箱根開放式野外美術館",tip:"雕塑公園，雨天也有室內區",km:93,driveMin:88,stayMin:120},

        {name:"蘆之湖遊覧船",      tip:"天氣好時富士山清晰可見",    km:96,driveMin:91,stayMin:75},

        {name:"箱根湯本・温泉街",  tip:"收工前泡腳湯",              km:87,driveMin:82,stayMin:60}

      ]},

      {city:"鎌倉",  driveH:1.0, spots:[

        {name:"鎌倉大佛（高德院）",tip:"戶外大佛，包車停長谷停車場", km:55,driveMin:60,stayMin:60},

        {name:"鶴岡八幡宮",        tip:"鎌倉最大神社，參道長500m",  km:53,driveMin:58,stayMin:60},

        {name:"小町通（商店街）",  tip:"鎌倉土產掃貨，八幡宮旁",    km:53,driveMin:58,stayMin:60},

        {name:"江之島",            tip:"海島神社，日落必看",          km:58,driveMin:63,stayMin:90}

      ]},

      {city:"熱海",  driveH:1.5, spots:[

        {name:"熱海サンビーチ",    tip:"海灘步道，早晨散步最舒服",  km:130,driveMin:110,stayMin:60},

        {name:"熱海城・錦ヶ浦",    tip:"山頂展望台，俯瞰相模灣",    km:132,driveMin:112,stayMin:60},

        {name:"起雲閣（歷史建築）",tip:"近代洋館，免費拍照點多",    km:131,driveMin:111,stayMin:75},

        {name:"熱海プリン本店",    tip:"超人氣布丁，值得排隊",      km:130,driveMin:110,stayMin:30}

      ]},

      {city:"日光",  driveH:2.0, spots:[

        {name:"日光東照宮",        tip:"德川家康廟，包車停表參道停車場",km:155,driveMin:130,stayMin:120},

        {name:"華嚴瀑布",          tip:"日本三大名瀑，東照宮旁20分",km:158,driveMin:133,stayMin:45},

        {name:"中禪寺湖",          tip:"火山口湖，華嚴瀑布上方",    km:160,driveMin:135,stayMin:60}

      ]},

      {city:"富士山", driveH:2.0, spots:[

        {name:"富士山五合目",      tip:"7-9月開山，包車停五合目",   km:145,driveMin:125,stayMin:90},

        {name:"河口湖",            tip:"富士山倒影最美拍照點",       km:135,driveMin:115,stayMin:75},

        {name:"忍野八海",          tip:"富士山伏流水湧出，河口湖旁",km:138,driveMin:118,stayMin:60}

      ]}

    ]

  },

  hokkaido:{

    destinations:[

      {city:"富良野", driveH:2.2, spots:[

        {name:"富田農場（薰衣草）",tip:"7月最盛開，早上光線好",     km:160,driveMin:130,stayMin:90},

        {name:"富良野起司工房",    tip:"現做起司免費試吃",          km:158,driveMin:128,stayMin:45},

        {name:"北西の丘展望公園",  tip:"360度丘陵景色，日落必拍",  km:155,driveMin:125,stayMin:40},

        {name:"富良野葡萄酒廠",    tip:"紅葡萄酒試飲，農場旁10分", km:162,driveMin:132,stayMin:45}

      ]},

      {city:"美瑛",  driveH:2.5, spots:[

        {name:"拼布之路・丘陵景觀",tip:"⚠️ 景點分散，包車才跑得完",km:175,driveMin:140,stayMin:90},

        {name:"青池（白金青い池）",tip:"神秘藍色水池，早上光線最好",km:180,driveMin:145,stayMin:60},

        {name:"四季彩之丘",        tip:"花田分區，適合拍照",         km:173,driveMin:138,stayMin:60},

        {name:"新榮之丘展望公園",  tip:"夕陽聖地，免費",            km:170,driveMin:135,stayMin:30},

        {name:"白鬚瀑布",          tip:"碧藍河水，青池旁5分",       km:181,driveMin:146,stayMin:30}

      ]},

      {city:"登別",  driveH:1.5, spots:[

        {name:"登別地獄谷",        tip:"火山噴煙地獄景觀，包車停地獄谷駐車場",km:90,driveMin:95,stayMin:75},

        {name:"大湯沼",            tip:"滾燙硫磺湖，地獄谷走10分", km:91,driveMin:96,stayMin:30},

        {name:"登別熊牧場",        tip:"北海道棕熊，纜車上山",      km:92,driveMin:97,stayMin:90},

        {name:"登別温泉街",        tip:"足湯免費，下午最悠閒",      km:90,driveMin:95,stayMin:60}

      ]},

      {city:"函館",  driveH:3.5, spots:[

        {name:"函館山夜景展望台",  tip:"日本三大夜景，包車上山比纜車快",km:290,driveMin:210,stayMin:75},

        {name:"金森紅磚倉庫群",    tip:"港口倉庫改造，函館朝市旁",   km:288,driveMin:208,stayMin:60},

        {name:"函館朝市",          tip:"新鮮海膽・毛蟹，早上6點開市",km:287,driveMin:207,stayMin:60},

        {name:"五稜郭公園",        tip:"星形要塞，春天賞櫻聖地",    km:289,driveMin:209,stayMin:75}

      ]},

      {city:"洞爺湖", driveH:1.7, spots:[

        {name:"洞爺湖遊覧船",      tip:"火山口湖遊覧，包車停碼頭",  km:110,driveMin:105,stayMin:75},

        {name:"昭和新山",          tip:"1944年噴出的新山，洞爺湖旁20分",km:115,driveMin:110,stayMin:45},

        {name:"有珠山纜車",        tip:"俯瞰洞爺湖全景",            km:114,driveMin:109,stayMin:75},

        {name:"洞爺湖温泉街",      tip:"足湯免費，晚上煙火常設",    km:110,driveMin:105,stayMin:60}

      ]},

      {city:"小樽",  driveH:0.75, spots:[

        {name:"小樽運河",          tip:"黃昏最美，路燈亮起時必拍",  km:40,driveMin:45,stayMin:60},

        {name:"堺町通・玻璃工藝街",tip:"北一硝子不能錯過",          km:40,driveMin:45,stayMin:90},

        {name:"小樽壽司屋通",      tip:"新鮮海膽・鮭魚卵",          km:39,driveMin:44,stayMin:60},

        {name:"天狗山展望台",      tip:"小樽市區夜景，纜車上山",    km:42,driveMin:47,stayMin:60}

      ]}

    ]

  },

  okinawa:{

    destinations:[

      {city:"石垣島", driveH:1.0, isAir:true, spots:[

        {name:"川平灣",            tip:"沖繩最美海灣，玻璃底船必搭",km:20,driveMin:30,stayMin:90},

        {name:"石垣島燈塔・禦神崎",tip:"珊瑚礁海岸，日落必拍",    km:25,driveMin:35,stayMin:60},

        {name:"底地海灘",          tip:"淺灘透明，浮潛首選",         km:15,driveMin:25,stayMin:90},

        {name:"石垣やいま村",      tip:"琉球古民家，體驗傳統文化",  km:10,driveMin:15,stayMin:75},

        {name:"米原海灘",          tip:"珊瑚礁浮潛，川平灣旁",      km:18,driveMin:28,stayMin:90}

      ]},

      {city:"宮古島", driveH:0.75, isAir:true, spots:[

        {name:"砂山海灘",          tip:"心形岩石拱門，日落聖地",    km:8,driveMin:15,stayMin:60},

        {name:"伊良部大橋",        tip:"全長3540m，免費通行，包車上橋",km:12,driveMin:20,stayMin:30},

        {name:"池間島・池間大橋",  tip:"珊瑚礁一望無際",            km:18,driveMin:25,stayMin:45},

        {name:"東平安名岬",        tip:"宮古島最東端，燈塔絕景",    km:25,driveMin:35,stayMin:45}

      ]},

      {city:"本部",  driveH:1.5, spots:[

        {name:"沖繩美麗海水族館",  tip:"鯨鯊必看，下午較少人",      km:95,driveMin:90,stayMin:180},

        {name:"古宇利島・古宇利大橋",tip:"開車上橋海景無敵",        km:80,driveMin:75,stayMin:60},

        {name:"備瀬福木林道",      tip:"美麗海水族館旁，自然隧道",  km:97,driveMin:92,stayMin:45},

        {name:"今歸仁城跡（世界遺產）",tip:"月見城，春天賞櫻聖地", km:85,driveMin:80,stayMin:75}

      ]}

    ]

  }

};

 

function haversine(a,b){

  const R=6371,toR=Math.PI/180;

  const dLat=(b.lat-a.lat)*toR,dLng=(b.lng-a.lng)*toR;

  const x=Math.sin(dLat/2)**2+Math.cos(a.lat*toR)*Math.cos(b.lat*toR)*Math.sin(dLng/2)**2;

  return R*2*Math.atan2(Math.sqrt(x),Math.sqrt(1-x));

}

function calcDayDist(areasSeq,hotelArea){

  if(!areasSeq||areasSeq.length===0)return 0;

  const all=[hotelArea,...areasSeq];let total=0;

  for(let i=0;i<all.length-1;i++){const a=COORDS[all[i]],b=COORDS[all[i+1]];if(a&&b)total+=haversine(a,b)*1.35;}

  return Math.round(total);

}

function calcDayHours(distKm){return distKm/60;}

 

// 移動日交通時間查表（優先查，查不到用 Haversine 估算）

const TRANSIT_HOURS={

  "大阪→奈良":1.4,"奈良→大阪":1.4,

  "大阪→神戶":0.75,"神戶→大阪":0.75,

  "大阪→京都嵐山":1.25,"京都嵐山→大阪":1.25,

  "大阪→姬路":1.2,"姬路→大阪":1.2,

  "東京→箱根":1.5,"箱根→東京":1.5,

  "東京→鎌倉":1.0,"鎌倉→東京":1.0,

  "東京→熱海":1.5,"熱海→東京":1.5,

  "東京→日光":2.0,"日光→東京":2.0,

  "東京→富士山":2.0,"富士山→東京":2.0,

  "箱根→熱海":0.75,"熱海→箱根":0.75,

  "札幌→富良野":2.2,"富良野→札幌":2.2,

  "札幌→美瑛":2.5,"美瑛→札幌":2.5,

  "札幌→登別":1.5,"登別→札幌":1.5,

  "札幌→函館":3.5,"函館→札幌":3.5,

  "札幌→洞爺湖":1.7,"洞爺湖→札幌":1.7,

  "札幌→小樽":0.75,"小樽→札幌":0.75,

  "那霸→石垣島":1.0,"石垣島→那霸":1.0,

  "那霸→宮古島":0.75,"宮古島→那霸":0.75,

  "那霸→本部":1.5,"本部→那霸":1.5,

};

 

function getMoveDayInfo(from,to){

  const key=from+'→'+to;

  const transitH=TRANSIT_HOURS[key]||(()=>{

    const a=CITY_COORD[from],b=CITY_COORD[to];

    return a&&b?Math.round(haversine(a,b)/80*10)/10:2;

  })();

  const usableH=Math.max(0,10-transitH-1.5);

  let maxSpots=0;

  if(usableH>=5)maxSpots=3;

  else if(usableH>=2.5)maxSpots=2;

  else if(usableH>=1)maxSpots=1;

  const destData=DEST_CITIES[S.city]?.destinations?.find(d=>d.city===to);

  const isAir=destData?.isAir||false;

  const transitKm=from&&to&&CITY_COORD[from]&&CITY_COORD[to]

    ?Math.round(haversine(CITY_COORD[from],CITY_COORD[to])*1.35):0;

  return{transitH,usableH,maxSpots,transitKm,isAir};

}

 

// 取得目的地城市的景點清單（from DEST_CITIES）

function getDestSpots(toCityName){

  if(!S.city||!DEST_CITIES[S.city])return[];

  const dest=DEST_CITIES[S.city].destinations.find(d=>d.city===toCityName);

  return dest?dest.spots:[];

}

 

// 切換移動日目的地城市

function changeDestCity(di,cityName){

  sw['dest-'+di]=cityName;

  sw['mv-'+di+'-0']=0;sw['mv-'+di+'-1']=0;sw['mv-'+di+'-2']=0;

  render(plan,currentCD);

  toast2('已切換目的地：'+cityName);

}

 

// 驗證一天是否超限，回傳 {ok, distKm, hours, warn}

const MAX_KM=280, MAX_HR=10;

function validateDay(day, hotelArea, cd){

  if(!day||day.theme?.includes('回程')||day.moveDay)

    return {ok:true,distKm:0,hours:0,warn:null};

  const slots=[day.morning,day.afternoon,day.evening].filter(Boolean);

  if(slots.length===0) return {ok:true,distKm:0,hours:0,warn:null};

  const areas=[];

  slots.forEach(s=>{ if(s?.area) areas.push(s.area); });

  if(day.food?.area && day.food.area!==areas[areas.length-1]) areas.push(day.food.area);

  const startArea=hotelArea||areas[0];

  const distKm=calcDayDist(areas,startArea);

  const hours=calcDayHours(distKm);

  let warn=null;

  if(distKm>MAX_KM||hours>MAX_HR){

    const overKm=distKm>MAX_KM,overHr=hours>MAX_HR;

    warn='⚠️ 今日行車約 '+distKm+'km・預估 '+hours.toFixed(1)+'h，';

    if(overKm&&overHr) warn+='超過 '+MAX_KM+'km 及 '+MAX_HR+'h 上限';

    else if(overKm) warn+='超過 '+MAX_KM+'km 上限';

    else warn+='超過 '+MAX_HR+'h 上限';

    warn+='。建議刪去「'+(areas[areas.length-2]||areas[areas.length-1])+'」區景點。';

  }

  return {ok:!warn,distKm,hours,warn};

}

 

// ── 狀態 ────────────────────────────────────────────────

let S={city:null,days:null,pace:null,group:null,hotel:null,tags:[]};

let plan=null,currentCD=null,sw={},tSw=0;

 

// ── 工具函數 ─────────────────────────────────────────────

function getCD(){

  if(S.hotel==='yes') return MULTI[S.city]||null;

  return SINGLE[S.city]||null;

}

 

function getPlan(cd,days){

  if(!cd) return [];

  const n=parseInt(days);

  const d=String(days);

 

  // 1. 完全符合直接用

  if(cd.days&&cd.days[d]) return cd.days[d].slice(0,n);

 

  // 2. 找最接近的基底天數

  let base=null;

  if(cd.days){

    const k=Object.keys(cd.days).sort((a,b)=>Math.abs(parseInt(a)-n)-Math.abs(parseInt(b)-n));

    if(k.length) base=cd.days[k[0]].slice();

  }

  if(!base) return [];

 

  // 3. 需要縮短：拿前 n-1 天的非回程 day + 最後一個回程 day

  if(base.length>=n){

    const returnDay=base.find(d=>d.theme&&d.theme.includes('回程'))||base[base.length-1];

    const nonReturn=base.filter(d=>!d.theme||!d.theme.includes('回程'));

    return [...nonReturn.slice(0,n-1), returnDay];

  }

 

  // 4. 需要延長：在回程日前插入「自由探索」補足

  const returnDay=base.find(d=>d.theme&&d.theme.includes('回程'))||base[base.length-1];

  const nonReturn=base.filter(d=>!d.theme||!d.theme.includes('回程'));

  const extras=[];

  // 找最後一個有景點的 day 作為模板（避免空 day）

  const tmpl=nonReturn[nonReturn.length-1]||nonReturn[0];

  for(let i=nonReturn.length+1;i<n;i++){

    extras.push({

      label:'Day '+i,

      theme:tmpl?tmpl.theme+'（延伸）':'自由探索',

      badge:'依心情安排',

      morning:tmpl?tmpl.morning:null,

      afternoon:tmpl?tmpl.afternoon:null,

      evening:null,

      food:tmpl?tmpl.food:null,

      travel:tmpl?tmpl.travel:null,

      note:'此天為自動延伸，可自行調整景點'

    });

  }

  return [...nonReturn, ...extras, returnDay];

}

 

// ── 表單選擇 ─────────────────────────────────────────────

function sel(btn){

  const g=btn.dataset.g;

  document.querySelectorAll(`[data-g="${g}"]`).forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('sel'));

  btn.classList.add('sel');

  S[g]=btn.dataset.v;

  // 選了城市 → 自動設單城市模式，清掉多城市選擇

  if(g==='city'){

    S.hotel='no';

    document.getElementById('hotel-yes').classList.remove('sel');

    document.getElementById('hotel-multi-note').style.display='none';

  }

  chk();

}

 

function tog(btn){

  const t=btn.dataset.tag;

  btn.classList.toggle('chk');

  S.tags.includes(t)?S.tags=S.tags.filter(x=>x!==t):S.tags.push(t);

}

 

function selHotel(v){

  const btn=document.getElementById('hotel-yes');

  if(v==='yes'){

    btn.classList.add('sel');

    document.getElementById('hotel-multi-note').style.display='block';

    S.hotel='yes';

    // 不清 S.city，getCD() 需要它查對應的多城市路線

    // 只在視覺上取消城市按鈕的選取樣式

    document.querySelectorAll('[data-g="city"]').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('sel'));

  }

  chk();

}

 

function chk(){

  const ready=(S.hotel==='yes')||!!S.city;

  document.getElementById('gbtn').disabled=!(ready&&S.days&&S.pace&&S.group);

}

 

// ── 生成行程 ─────────────────────────────────────────────

function toast2(m,d=2500){const t=document.getElementById('toast');t.textContent=m;t.classList.add('show');setTimeout(()=>t.classList.remove('show'),d);}

 

function gen(){

  document.getElementById('form').style.display='none';

  document.getElementById('ld').classList.add('show');

  document.getElementById('d0').classList.remove('active');document.getElementById('d0').classList.add('done');

  document.getElementById('d1').classList.add('active');document.getElementById('slbl').textContent='生成行程中';

  setTimeout(()=>{

    document.getElementById('ld').classList.remove('show');

    build();

    document.getElementById('rs').classList.add('show');

    document.getElementById('d1').classList.remove('active');document.getElementById('d1').classList.add('done');

    document.getElementById('d2').classList.add('active');document.getElementById('slbl').textContent='行程完成';

  },1600);

}

 

function build(){

  const cn={osaka_kyoto:'大阪・京都',tokyo:'東京',hokkaido:'北海道',okinawa:'沖繩'};

  const pn={easy:'輕鬆節奏',balanced:'平衡節奏',active:'積極節奏'};

  const gn={couple:'情侶',friends:'朋友',family:'家庭',kids:'親子'};

  const days=parseInt(S.days);

  const cityLabel = (S.hotel==='yes'&&S.city&&MULTI[S.city]) ? MULTI[S.city].label : cn[S.city]||'';

  document.getElementById('rt').textContent=`${cityLabel} ${days}天${days-1}夜`;

  document.getElementById('rm').textContent=`${pn[S.pace]}・${gn[S.group]}出遊`;

  currentCD=getCD();

  plan=getPlan(currentCD,S.days);

  sw={};tSw=0;

  render(plan,currentCD);

  setTimeout(fillForm,100);

}

 

// ── 渲染卡片 ─────────────────────────────────────────────

function render(p,cd){

  const c=document.getElementById('cards');c.innerHTML='';

 

  function getHotelArea(di){

    if(S.hotel==='yes'){for(let i=di-1;i>=0;i--){if(p[i]&&p[i].hotel)return p[i].hotel;}return null;}

    const firstSpots=Object.keys((cd&&cd.spots)||{});

    return firstSpots[0]||null;

  }

 

  p.forEach(function(day,di){

    const card=document.createElement('div');card.className='dc';

    const hotelArea=getHotelArea(di);

    const v=validateDay(day,hotelArea,cd);

 

    // ── 提前計算 overrideCity（用於標題和景點）──

    let earlyOverride=null;

    if(!day.moveDay&&!day.theme?.includes('回程')){

      for(let pi=di-1;pi>=0;pi--){

        if(plan[pi]&&plan[pi].moveDay){

          earlyOverride=sw['dest-'+pi]||plan[pi].to;

          break;

        }

      }

    }

    // 若有 override 且有對應景點資料，更新標題

    const hasOverrideData=earlyOverride&&DEST_CITIES[S.city]?.destinations?.find(d=>d.city===earlyOverride);

    const effectiveTheme=hasOverrideData?earlyOverride+'・深度遊覽':day.theme;

    const effectiveBadge=hasOverrideData?'包車全日制':day.badge;

    const effectiveHotel=hasOverrideData?earlyOverride:day.hotel;

 

    // 距離徽章

    let distBadge='';

    if(!day.moveDay&&day.theme&&!day.theme.includes('回程')&&v.distKm>0){

      const bg=v.ok?'rgba(74,124,89,.12)':'#c8502a';

      const col=v.ok?'#2d6040':'white';

      distBadge='<span style="font-size:10px;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:10px;margin-left:6px;font-weight:500;background:'+bg+';color:'+col+';display:inline-block">'+v.distKm+'km</span>';

    }

 

    let h='<div class="dh"><div class="dl">'+day.label+'｜'+effectiveTheme+distBadge+'</div><div class="db">'+effectiveBadge+'</div></div><div class="dbody">';

 

    // 距離警示

    if(v.warn){

      h+='<div style="background:#fff0ed;border:1.5px solid #c8502a;border-radius:8px;padding:10px 13px;margin-bottom:11px;font-size:12px;color:#8a2000;line-height:1.7">'+v.warn+'</div>';

    } else if(!day.moveDay&&day.theme&&!day.theme.includes('回程')&&v.distKm>0){

      h+='<div style="background:rgba(74,124,89,.06);border-radius:6px;padding:7px 10px;margin-bottom:11px;font-size:11px;color:#2d6040">✅ 今日行車 '+v.distKm+'km・約 '+v.hours.toFixed(1)+'h，符合規範</div>';

    }

 

    // 備註

    if(day.note) h+='<div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:11px;padding:7px 10px;background:var(--warm);border-radius:6px">'+day.note+'</div>';

 

    // 回程日

    if(day.theme&&day.theme.includes('回程')){

      h+='<div style="text-align:center;padding:18px 0;color:var(--muted);font-size:14px">☕ 早上咖啡・輕鬆散步<br><span style="font-size:11px;display:block;margin-top:4px">中午前出發機場，不排任何景點</span></div></div></div>';

      card.innerHTML=h;c.appendChild(card);return;

    }

 

    // 移動日 banner + 目的地選擇 + 動態景點

    if(day.moveDay){

      const activeDest=sw['dest-'+di]||day.to;

      const mi=getMoveDayInfo(day.from,activeDest);

      const luggageHtml=day.luggageTip?'<div class="move-day-lock">🧳 '+day.luggageTip+'</div>':'';

      const transitLabel=mi.isAir?'✈️ 飛機 約 '+Math.round(mi.transitH*60)+'分':

        '🚐 包車約 '+Math.round(mi.transitH*60)+'分'+(mi.transitKm>0&&mi.transitKm<=300?' · '+mi.transitKm+'km':'');

      const spotsLabel=mi.maxSpots===0?'今日以移動為主，抵達即入住':

        '交通後剩約 '+mi.usableH.toFixed(1)+'h，最多排 '+mi.maxSpots+' 個景點';

      h+='<div class="move-day"><div class="move-day-icon">'+(mi.isAir?'✈️':'🚐')+'</div><div class="move-day-info"><div class="move-day-route">'+day.from+' → '+activeDest+'</div><div class="move-day-tip">'+transitLabel+'</div><div style="font-size:11px;color:rgba(250,247,242,.55);margin-top:3px">'+spotsLabel+'</div>'+luggageHtml+'</div><div class="move-day-badge">移動日</div></div>';

 

      // ── 目的地城市選擇按鈕 ──

      const allDests=DEST_CITIES[S.city]?DEST_CITIES[S.city].destinations:[];

      if(allDests.length>0){

        h+='<div style="margin-top:10px;padding:10px 12px;background:var(--warm);border-radius:8px">';

        h+='<div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;font-weight:600">🗺️ 今日目的地城市</div>';

        h+='<div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px">';

        allDests.forEach(function(dest){

          const isActive=dest.city===activeDest;

          const mi2=getMoveDayInfo(day.from,dest.city);

          const timeLabel=mi2.isAir?'✈️ '+Math.round(mi2.transitH*60)+'分':'🚐 '+Math.round(mi2.transitH*60)+'分';

          const over=mi2.transitH>7;

          h+='<button onclick="changeDestCity('+di+',\''+dest.city+'\')" style="padding:6px 11px;border:1.5px solid '+(isActive?'var(--accent)':'var(--border)')

            +';border-radius:20px;background:'+(isActive?'rgba(200,80,42,.08)':'white')

            +';font-size:12px;font-family:\'DM Sans\',sans-serif;cursor:pointer;color:'+(isActive?'var(--accent)':'var(--ink)')

            +';font-weight:'+(isActive?'600':'400')

            +'">'+(isActive?'✓ ':'')+dest.city+' <span style="font-size:10px;color:'+(over?'#c8502a':'var(--muted)')+'">'+timeLabel+'</span></button>';

        });

        h+='</div></div>';

      }

 

      // ── 目的地景點（每個 slot 用不同的初始 offset 避免重複）──

      const destSpots=getDestSpots(activeDest);

      if(mi.maxSpots>0&&destSpots.length>0){

        h+='<div style="margin-top:10px;padding-top:10px;border-top:1px solid var(--warm)">';

        h+='<div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;font-weight:500">🚐 包車抵達後・'+activeDest+'景點</div>';

        for(let si=0;si<mi.maxSpots;si++){

          const swKey='mv-'+di+'-'+si;

          // si 作為 base offset，確保三個 slot 預設顯示不同景點

          const idx=(si+(sw[swKey]||0))%Math.max(destSpots.length,1);

          const sp=destSpots[idx]||{name:'自由探索',tip:'依心情決定'};

          const slotLabel=si===0?'下午':si===1?'傍晚':'晚上';

          const driveTag=sp.driveMin?'<span style="font-size:10px;background:#f0ebe0;color:var(--muted);padding:1px 6px;border-radius:8px;margin-left:4px">🚐 '+sp.driveMin+'分</span>':'';

          const stayTag=sp.stayMin?'<span style="font-size:10px;background:#f0ebe0;color:var(--muted);padding:1px 6px;border-radius:8px;margin-left:4px">⏱ '+sp.stayMin+'分</span>':'';

          h+='<div class="sl"><div class="st">'+slotLabel+'</div><div class="sc"><div class="sm"><div class="sn">'+sp.name+driveTag+stayTag+'</div><div class="sa">'+activeDest+'</div>'+(sp.tip?'<div class="tip">💡 '+sp.tip+'</div>':'')+'</div><button class="swp" id="mv-sw-'+di+'-'+si+'" onclick="swapMV('+di+','+si+')">換一個</button></div></div>';

          if(si<mi.maxSpots-1) h+='<div class="dv"></div>';

        }

        h+='</div>';

      } else if(mi.maxSpots===0){

        h+='<div style="margin-top:10px;text-align:center;padding:10px 0;color:var(--muted);font-size:12px">抵達後直接辦理入住，好好休息 🛏️</div>';

      }

    } else {

 

    // ── 非移動日：找最近一個 moveDay，若用戶換了目的地，後續天數跟著用新城市景點 ──

    let overrideCity=null;

    let overrideMdi=-1;

    for(let pi=di-1;pi>=0;pi--){

      if(plan[pi]&&plan[pi].moveDay){

        const userDest=sw['dest-'+pi]||plan[pi].to;

        overrideCity=userDest;

        overrideMdi=pi;

        break;

      }

    }

 

    // 景點 slots（一般日）

    const slots=[{t:'早上',d:day.morning},{t:'下午',d:day.afternoon},{t:'晚上',d:day.evening}].filter(s=>s.d);

    if(!slots.length&&di===0) h+='<div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);padding:8px 0">抵達・Check-in 後附近散步即可</div>';

 

    // 如果前一天換了目的地，且今天還在同一住宿城市，改用目的地景點

    const useDestPool=overrideCity&&DEST_CITIES[S.city]?.destinations?.find(d=>d.city===overrideCity);

    const destPoolSpots=useDestPool?getDestSpots(overrideCity):null;

 

    if(useDestPool&&destPoolSpots&&destPoolSpots.length>0){

      // 隔天在目的地城市，直接用目的地景點 pool

      h+='<div style="background:rgba(74,124,89,.06);border-radius:6px;padding:6px 10px;margin-bottom:9px;font-size:11px;color:#2d6040">📍 今日景點已切換為 '+overrideCity+' 的內容</div>';

      const daySlots=[{t:'早上'},{t:'下午'},{t:'晚上'}].slice(0,slots.length||3);

      daySlots.forEach(function(sl,si){

        if(si>=destPoolSpots.length)return;

        const idx=(si+(sw[di+'-'+si]||0))%Math.max(destPoolSpots.length,1);

        const sp=destPoolSpots[idx]||{name:'自由探索',tip:'依心情決定'};

        const kmTag=sp.km?'<span style="font-size:10px;background:#f0ebe0;color:var(--muted);padding:1px 6px;border-radius:8px;margin-left:4px">📍 '+sp.km+'km</span>':'';

        const driveTag=sp.driveMin?'<span style="font-size:10px;background:#f0ebe0;color:var(--muted);padding:1px 6px;border-radius:8px;margin-left:2px">🚐 '+sp.driveMin+'分</span>':'';

        const stayTag=sp.stayMin?'<span style="font-size:10px;background:#f0ebe0;color:var(--muted);padding:1px 6px;border-radius:8px;margin-left:2px">⏱ '+sp.stayMin+'分</span>':'';

        h+='<div class="sl"><div class="st">'+sl.t+'</div><div class="sc"><div class="sm"><div class="sn">'+sp.name+kmTag+driveTag+stayTag+'</div><div class="sa">'+overrideCity+'</div>'+(sp.tip?'<div class="tip">💡 '+sp.tip+'</div>':'')+'</div><button class="swp" id="sw-'+di+'-'+si+'" onclick="swapS('+di+','+si+')">換一個</button></div></div>';

        if(si<daySlots.length-1&&si<destPoolSpots.length-1) h+='<div class="dv"></div>';

      });

    } else {

      // 原本的景點邏輯

      slots.forEach(function(sl,si){

        if(!sl.d||!cd)return;

        const ar=cd.spots[sl.d.area]||[];

        const idx=(sl.d.index+(sw[di+'-'+si]||0))%Math.max(ar.length,1);

        const sp=ar[idx]||{name:'自由探索',tip:'依心情決定'};

        const kmTag=sp.km?'<span style="font-size:10px;background:#f0ebe0;color:var(--muted);padding:1px 6px;border-radius:8px;margin-left:4px">📍 '+sp.km+'km</span>':'';

        const driveTag=sp.driveMin?'<span style="font-size:10px;background:#f0ebe0;color:var(--muted);padding:1px 6px;border-radius:8px;margin-left:2px">🚐 '+sp.driveMin+'分</span>':'';

        const stayTag=sp.stayMin?'<span style="font-size:10px;background:#f0ebe0;color:var(--muted);padding:1px 6px;border-radius:8px;margin-left:2px">⏱ '+sp.stayMin+'分</span>':'';

        const swpBtn='<button class="swp" id="sw-'+di+'-'+si+'" onclick="swapS('+di+','+si+')">換一個</button>';

        h+='<div class="sl"><div class="st">'+sl.t+'</div><div class="sc"><div class="sm"><div class="sn">'+sp.name+kmTag+driveTag+stayTag+'</div><div class="sa">'+sl.d.area+'</div>'+(sp.tip?'<div class="tip">💡 '+sp.tip+'</div>':'')+'</div>'+swpBtn+'</div></div>';

        if(si<slots.length-1) h+='<div class="dv"></div>';

      });

    }

    if(day.food&&cd){

      const af=cd.restaurants[day.food.area]||[];

      const fi=(day.food.index+(sw['f-'+di]||0))%Math.max(af.length,1);

      const fd=af[fi]||{name:'Google Maps 找 4.0↑',backup:'附近隨機',tag:'自由選'};

      h+='<div class="fs2"><div class="fl">🍴 今日餐廳</div><div class="fm"><span>'+fd.name+'</span><div style="display:flex;gap:5px;align-items:center"><span class="ftg">'+(fd.tag||'')+'</span><button class="swp" onclick="swapF('+di+')" style="font-size:10px;padding:4px 9px">換</button></div></div><div class="fbk">備案：'+fd.backup+' ｜ 排隊>30分鐘直接換</div></div>';

    }

 

    if(day.travel) h+='<div class="tn">🚐 包車 '+day.travel+'</div>';

 

    // 住宿標示（多城市）

    if(effectiveHotel) h+='<div style="margin-top:9px;font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px">🏨 今晚住：<strong style="color:var(--ink)">'+effectiveHotel+'</strong></div>';

 

    } // end else (non-moveDay)

 

    h+='</div>';card.innerHTML=h;c.appendChild(card);

  });

}

 

// ── 換一個（移動日目的地景點）────────────────────────────────

function swapMV(di,si,poolSize){

  const key='mv-'+di+'-'+si;

  sw[key]=(sw[key]||0)+1;

  tSw++;

  const b=document.getElementById('mv-sw-'+di+'-'+si);

  if(b){b.classList.add('swapped');b.textContent='✓ 換好了';setTimeout(function(){b.classList.remove('swapped');b.textContent='換一個';},900);}

  render(plan,currentCD);

  toast2('已換成'+plan[di].to+'的其他景點');

}

 

// ── 換一個 ───────────────────────────────────────────────

function swapS(di,si){

  sw[`${di}-${si}`]=(sw[`${di}-${si}`]||0)+1;tSw++;

  const b=document.getElementById(`sw-${di}-${si}`);

  if(b){b.classList.add('swapped');b.textContent='✓ 換好了';setTimeout(()=>{b.classList.remove('swapped');b.textContent='換一個';},900);}

  render(plan,currentCD);

  if(tSw===2)setTimeout(()=>document.getElementById('ub').classList.add('show'),400);

  toast2('已換成同區域的其他選項');

}

function swapF(di){sw[`f-${di}`]=(sw[`f-${di}`]||0)+1;tSw++;render(plan,currentCD);toast2('餐廳已更換備案');}

 

// ── 突發狀況 ─────────────────────────────────────────────

function sit(t){

  const m={

    queue:'建議：直接離開，用 Google Maps 搜附近 4.0↑、評論200以上的店，走過去吃。不要糾結。',

    rain:'建議：改去室內景點——百貨、美術館、室內市場。',

    late:'建議：刪掉今天最後一個景點，優先保留吃飯時間。行程寧可少、不要趕。',

    tired:'建議：找最近的咖啡廳坐30分鐘，或直接回飯店休息。'

  };

  toast2(m[t],4000);

}

 

// ── 詢價單填入 ───────────────────────────────────────────

function fillForm(){

  const cn={osaka_kyoto:'大阪・京都',tokyo:'東京',hokkaido:'北海道',okinawa:'沖繩'};

  const days=parseInt(S.days);

  document.getElementById('i6').value=`${days}天${days-1}夜`;

  document.getElementById('i7').value=S.hotel==='yes'?'東京・箱根・熱海':(cn[S.city]||'');

  if(!plan)return;

  let it='';

  plan.forEach((day,di)=>{

    if(day.theme&&day.theme.includes('回程')){it+=`${day.label}：回程，機場離境\n`;return;}

    if(day.moveDay){it+=`${day.label}：【移動日】${day.from}→${day.to}，${day.travel||''}\n`;return;}

    let spots=[];

    [{d:day.morning},{d:day.afternoon},{d:day.evening}].filter(s=>s.d).forEach((sl,si)=>{

      if(!sl.d||!currentCD)return;

      const ar=currentCD.spots[sl.d.area]||[];

      const idx=(sl.d.index+(sw[`${di}-${si}`]||0))%Math.max(ar.length,1);

      if(ar[idx])spots.push(ar[idx].name);

    });

    let fd='';

    if(day.food&&currentCD){const af=currentCD.restaurants[day.food.area]||[];const fi=(day.food.index+(sw[`f-${di}`]||0))%Math.max(af.length,1);if(af[fi])fd=`（餐：${af[fi].name}）`;}

    it+=`${day.label}：${spots.join('→')||day.theme}${fd}\n`;

  });

  document.getElementById('i8').value=it.trim();

}

 

// ── 複製詢價單 ───────────────────────────────────────────

function copy(){

  const sv=document.querySelector('input[name="sv"]:checked')?.value;

  const svt=sv==='plan'?'需要協助規劃行程（NT$2,000諮詢費，成團可折抵）':'已規劃好行程，只需報價';

  const g=id=>document.getElementById(id)?.value?.trim()||'（未填）';

  const txt=`【GOJAPAN 日本包車詢價】\n\n1. 台灣居住縣市：${g('i1')}\n2. 出發地點：${g('i2')}\n3. 旅遊結束地點：${g('i3')}\n4. 預定包車日期：${g('i4')}\n5. 包車人數：${g('i5')}\n6. 包車天數：${g('i6')}\n7. 旅遊城市：${g('i7')}\n8. 具體行程：\n${g('i8')}\n9. 每日住宿：${g('i9')}\n10. 兒童座椅：${g('i10')}\n11. 行李：${g('i11')}\n12. 航班抵達：${g('i12')}\n13. 航班離境：${g('i13')}\n\n諮詢需求：${svt}\n\n（此詢價單由 GOJAPAN AI 行程規劃工具產生）`;

  navigator.clipboard.writeText(txt).then(()=>{

    const b=document.getElementById('cpbtn');b.textContent='✅ 已複製！貼到 LINE 即可';b.classList.add('copied');

    setTimeout(()=>{b.textContent='📋 一鍵複製詢價單 → 貼到 LINE';b.classList.remove('copied');},3000);

    toast2('詢價單已複製，請貼到 GOJAPAN LINE 客服',3000);

  }).catch(()=>toast2('請手動選取並複製詢價單內容',3000));

}

 

// ── 重新規劃 ─────────────────────────────────────────────

function reset(){

  S={city:null,days:null,pace:null,group:null,hotel:null,tags:[]};

  sw={};tSw=0;plan=null;currentCD=null;

  document.querySelectorAll('.ob').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('sel'));

  document.querySelectorAll('.cb').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('chk'));

  document.getElementById('hotel-multi-note').style.display='none';

  document.getElementById('gbtn').disabled=true;

  document.getElementById('form').style.display='block';

  document.getElementById('rs').classList.remove('show');

  document.getElementById('ub').classList.remove('show');

  document.getElementById('cards').innerHTML='';

  ['d0','d1','d2'].forEach(id=>{document.getElementById(id).classList.remove('active','done');});

  document.getElementById('d0').classList.add('active');

  document.getElementById('slbl').textContent='填寫偏好';

  window.scrollTo({top:0,behavior:'smooth'});

}

</script>

</body>

</html>
